data_in.description: specXplore session data object containing processed spectral data and precomputed ms2deepscore similarity scores

data_out.description: 2-D t-SNE coordinate file mapping spectrum identifiers to (x, y) positions in embedding space

domain_knowledge: ms2deepscore is a learned deep-learning similarity metric for tandem mass spectra that captures spectral relatedness beyond simple spectral angle or cosine similarity.
t-SNE (t-distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding) uses a distance or similarity matrix as input and produces a 2-D projection optimized to preserve local neighborhood structure.
The t-SNE embedding must accept the ms2deepscore pairwise distance matrix as its input metric to ensure consistency with the intended mass spectral similarity topology.
The resulting 2-D coordinates serve as the visual anchor for the specXplore overview, onto which network views, similarity heatmaps, and other downstream analyses are projected.

direct_checks: Verify that kevinmildau/specXplore repository is accessible on GitHub and contains source code for t-SNE embedding pipeline
Verify that ms2deepscore package is importable and callable from the specXplore codebase
Verify that output file exists and is in a standard 2-D coordinate format (CSV, TSV, NPY, or similar)
Verify output file contains exactly two numeric columns (or equivalent structured representation of 2-D coordinates)
Verify that coordinate values are within plausible t-SNE range (typically [-100, 100] or similar bounded space), robust to different random seeds
Verify that the number of rows in output coordinates matches the number of input spectra
expert_review: Expert judgment on whether t-SNE hyperparameters (perplexity, learning rate, n_iter) are documented and appropriate for mass spectral dataset size
Expert judgment on whether the embedding quality is sufficient to visually separate spectrally distinct compounds and cluster similar spectra
Expert judgment on whether ms2deepscore distance metric is correctly applied as input to t-SNE (e.g., whether it is used as a precomputed distance matrix or similarity is converted to distance)
Expert judgment on reproducibility: whether random seed is fixed or documented such that embeddings can be regenerated with equivalent structure

cmd: import pickle; import numpy as np; from sklearn.manifold import TSNE; from ms2deepscore import MS2DeepScore; session = pickle.load(open('{inputs.session_data}', 'rb')); similarity_matrix = session.get('similarity_scores'); distance_matrix = 1 - similarity_matrix; tsne = TSNE(n_components=2, metric='precomputed', random_state=42); embedding = tsne.fit_transform(distance_matrix); spectrum_ids = session.get('spectrum_ids'); output = np.column_stack([spectrum_ids, embedding]); np.savetxt('tsne_embedding.csv', output, delimiter=',', header='spectrum_id,x,y', comments='', fmt='%s,%.6f,%.6f')

finding: specXplore uses a t-SNE embedding approach that takes ms2deepscore-computed mass spectral similarities as input and produces a 2-D overview representation, which serves as the foundation for the interactive dashboard visualization.
inputs: specXplore session data object containing processed spectral data and precomputed ms2deepscore similarity scores
methodology_summary: Load the specXplore session data object containing processed spectral features and precomputed ms2deepscore pairwise similarity scores.
Convert ms2deepscore similarities to distance metric (e.g., 1 − similarity or equivalent dissimilarity representation) as required by t-SNE.
Execute t-SNE algorithm with the ms2deepscore distance matrix as input to compute 2-D embedding coordinates for each spectrum.
Export the t-SNE coordinates (spectrum identifier, x-coordinate, y-coordinate) to a structured file.
Validation: Confirm that the output file contains one row per spectrum with valid numeric coordinates in the 2-D embedding space and matches the spectrum count from the input session data object.

task_description: Compute a 2-D t-SNE embedding of mass spectral data using ms2deepscore similarity scores as input distances, producing coordinate output that serves as the overview representation for specXplore visualization.

task_inputs.label: specXplore session data object with spectral data and ms2deepscore matrix

task_objective: Implement the t-SNE embedding computation pipeline that converts ms2deepscore distance matrices into 2-D coordinates for the specXplore overview visualization.
title: Implement the ms2deepscore-based t-SNE embedding component within specXplore

workflow_description: 1. Load processed spectral data and precomputed ms2deepscore similarity matrix from the specXplore session data object. 2. Apply t-SNE algorithm with ms2deepscore distances as the input distance metric to reduce the high-dimensional spectral similarity space into 2-D coordinates. 3. Save the resulting 2-D t-SNE coordinates (spectrum identifier and x, y positions) to a structured output file for downstream dashboard rendering.
